recommended_batches.name: Proven avatars — promote to public UI
recommended_batches.notes: Both already browser-smoke tested. Just needs avatarRegistry entry + commit.

recommended_batches.name: Inspect-passed humanoids — convert + validate + smoke
recommended_batches.action: For each: rig_prep --mode convert → validate_vrm → add to generatedAvatarRegistry → smoke test
notes: Batman is the best candidate — correct scale (1.69m), 24 bones, full finger support
Iron Man needs scale normalize (6.49m) — exporter handles this
Shrek has poor finger support (curl presets) — disable fingers in adapter

recommended_batches.name: Remaining humanoids — inspect + convert + validate + smoke
recommended_batches.action: For each: rig_prep --mode inspect → rig_prep --mode convert → validate → smoke
notes: ASM2 and T-800 already inspected — can skip inspect for those

recommended_batches.name: Cleanup-required humanoids
recommended_batches.action: Inspect → cleanup bone map → convert → validate → smoke
notes: These models have low automatic humanoid mapping
Need manual Blender bone map editing (suggested-bone-map.json exists but may be incomplete)
Jack Sparrow: humanoid_with_offsets profile, cloth sim concerns
Elsa: missing spine bone, needs mapping
Teal-v2: missing hips/chest/neck, very weak auto-mapping
Buzz: missing hips/spine/chest/neck/head, nearly zero auto-mapping

recommended_batches.name: Hand-only test model
recommended_batches.notes: Specialized model for finger tracking R&D, not a production avatar

recommended_batches.name: Creature avatars
recommended_batches.action: Creature profile system + inspect + convert + validate + smoke
notes: Requires new retargeting profile system in src/rig/
Non-humanoid anatomy cannot use standard humanoid full-body mode
Each creature may need unique bone mapping strategy
Performance concerns: king-kong and godzilla are very_heavy models

mega_run_batch_1_command: for slug in fortnite-batman iron-man shrek; do echo "=== $slug ==="; python3 tools/rig_prep_model.py --slug $slug --mode convert 2>&1 | tail -5; python3 tools/validate_vrm_candidate.py --slug $slug 2>&1 | tail -5; done
